★男主因为要考试复习 于是姐姐找了大学同学来当男主家庭教师~但之后的发展则是授业到天亮了（别的方面~）随后还有亲姐姐的加入~最后发现姐姐大学同学居然还是百合www~★  
  
★ズッキーニ 的御姐角色（包括各种母系角色）一直都是实用类的画风~这次更是含彩页在内将近40页的短篇~诚意满满啊~★

Current Website : http://niccori.jp/  
  
The old website link is defunct and listed solely for informational purposes. The new site is far less informative and no longer carries the DVD covers since it has gone digital-only. It has also dropped the Fairy Doll name but a search using the product codes will still return some relevant information. A search on DMM will provide DVD covers and screenshots.
